untranslatable_reason: Signal requires intraday time-of-day logic ('around midday' vs 'after midday') and volume decline detection that cannot be expressed with static bar-by-bar conditions. Donchian channels approximate range testing, but the temporal sequencing (range tests midday, then breakout trades post-midday) and volume confirmation ('volume drops toward midday') require time-aware execution logic not available in this rule engine.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Donchian channels (dc_upper/dc_lower) to represent daily trading range boundaries. Entry conditions model range tests and breakouts. Hold duration set to 1 day (balance of day). However, this is a lossy translation—the signal's core logic depends on intraday timing and volume behavior that cannot be captured by end-of-bar conditions alone. A production implementation would need intraday bar iteration and clock-time filtering.
